title: Ratio [16x] - Black & White
description: A Black & White recolor of the Ratio [16x], a "tryhard" themed resource pack
body:
Ratio is a 1.8.9 pvp pack inspired by packs used in ranked bedwars (like the pack dewier uses) while still adding some details to make the pack more complete.

Here are some ingame screenshots of the pack :

![Ratio black & white](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba17d8c35d28851d0cbb9dd371ccd665adba01c8.jpeg)

![Ratio Black 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ceeb34217e75143abe40e52af6c021218edfe6c.jpeg)

![Ratio black 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6457b8894ddef80887049d571364c39ab4fb042d.jpeg)

It also have 5 recolors :

- The Original pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio)

![Ratio prev 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d97dc19ec8ffdd9a15ff7518c256fcf9635713d0.jpeg)

- The Blue recolor : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-blue](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-blue)

![Ratio blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462c73602bf8d011e6e0c6875c325459ab3d2d1d.jpeg)

- The Green recolor : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-green](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-green)

![Ratio green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ca0a55f74a2f1ac1783661bed63188c1b4ca7b.jpeg)

The Red recolor : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-red](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-red)

![Ratio red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebcaa4c42b8a834181e6a1888538852ce06d85ed.jpeg)

- The Purple recolor : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-purple](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ratio-purple)

![Ratio purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb99c057b0cb9019f115e1702a06b447774e73f3.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
